subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — I'd be glad to set up a follow-up meeting to explore how we might work together.

Please share a few time slots that work for you next week, along with your timezone, and I'll coordinate on our end.

As for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to share those externally. After our initial conversation, I can help arrange the right introductions if it makes sense.

Talk soon.

Best regards
